name: superrare-mint
title: SuperRare Mint - Agentic Minting via Bankr
description: Mint art into a SuperRare-compatible ERC-721 collection on Ethereum using Bankr signing. Upload media and metadata to SuperRare, build mint calldata safely, and record auditable receipts.
author: aaigotchi
features: 🖼️ Upload image and optional video to SuperRare
🧾 Generate pinned metadata and token URI
🧪 Dry-run by default for safe previews
📦 Writes auditable JSON receipts with tx hash and token ID

steps: Clone repository to OpenClaw skills directory
Set collection, receiver, royalty receiver, and RPC
Ensure Bankr is configured on the agent

usage: Use pin-metadata.mjs to upload media and get a token URI, mint-via-bankr.sh to dry-run or broadcast a mint, or mint-art.sh for the full end-to-end flow.
